Cleaner and quieter than competing super-apps, with three-tier radii (8px buttons / 12px cards / 100px filter pills) and badge-driven promo grammar.
items.signature_motion: Filter-chip selection fills #1D8BFF with no geometry change over motion-fast/ease-standard — fast and committed, never bouncy.

items.visual_theme: Appetite plus joy — a hot red-pink forward-motion accent over a bright white canvas where food photography supplies the craving. Soft rounded cards make the path from hungry to ordered fast and delightful.
antipatterns: extra steps in the order path
items.signature_motion: Cart badge increments with a 1.15 scale-pop in red; sticky bottom cart bar slides up when the cart gains an item.

items.visual_theme: Cream paper canvas with reddish-warm near-black text and signature orange; warm approachable automation.
items.signature_motion: Inset orange underline marks active tabs; sand underline previews hover.

items.visual_theme: Near-monochrome real-estate map tool — near-black #171719 type at weight 400, functional blue #0066ff for action only, brand orange reserved for wordmark, disabled-by-transparency neutrals so the map carries the surface.

items.signature_motion: Map-floating chrome: 8/10px-radius chips fade to rgba(55,56,60,0.16) on disabled; bookmark toggle is 50% circular outline→filled.

items.visual_theme: Mobile-as-canvas fashion playground locked to 600px max-width even on desktop — off-white #f5f6f6 surface, ZIGZAG brand pink #fa6ee3 for wordmark + favorites, interactive pink #f55dd6 for CTAs, coral #fb4333 for alerts.
antipatterns: No desktop multi-column reflow (mobile centred is the brand)
items.signature_motion: 찜 heart: outline → filled brand pink with brief pulse; primary CTA uses pink-400 fill, darkening to pink-450/550 on hover/press.

Its design language is uncompromisingly editorial: a near-monochrome system of pure black (`#000000`) and pure white (`#ffffff`) that gets out of the way and lets garment photography carry every screen.
